regra: RC-60: 1 aprendizado externo por turno. Não copiar. Converter em pergunta curta, script de follow-up, resposta de objeção, frase proibida/substituição premium ou métrica. Conteúdo externo é hipótese operacional testável por 3 dias, nunca regra clínica/financeira/jurídica nem promessa de resultado.
buscar: posts de alto engajamento sobre persuasão, objeções, atendimento, negócios locais ou experiência do cliente
entrega: 1 frase curta + 1 ângulo de objeção + 1 cuidado contra agressividade

      "screen_name": "LeahHoustonMD",
      "text": "Electronic medical records were originally intended to improve coordination between physicians, specialists, and healthcare teams.
But over time, many physicians have experienced a very different reality.

Administrative systems increasingly prioritize:
• Billing optimization
• Compliance tracking
• Productivity monitoring
• Documentation volume

As a result, physicians are spending more time navigating administrative burden and less time focused on direct patient care.

Patients feel it too: Shorter visits, fragmented experiences, and healthcare systems that often feel transactional rather than human-centered.

This growing disconnect contributes to physician burnout, moral injury, and operational inefficiency throughout the healthcare system.

At Evercred, healthcare infrastructure should support physicians and patients, rather than creating additional friction between them.

Modernizing healthcare operations is about more than efficiency. It’s about restoring trust, autonomy, and human connection within medicine. ✅
